steps.title: Compare the two positions
steps.content: Text 1 says The Nutcracker is outdated and should no longer be produced. Text 2 agrees that the show can be outdated but argues that it should be kept and creatively updated.

steps.title: Choose revision over rejection
steps.content: Choice A says Text 2 rejects updated versions, but Text 2 supports them. Choice B says audiences have stopped attending, though Text 2 calls the show a holiday favorite. Choice C overstates the income claim. Text 2 favors revised versions rather than complete rejection. The answer is D.
